name: Expand mempalace-auto-save-hooks.md for all AI tools

description: Baseline: mempalace-auto-save-hooks.md only covers Claude Code (1 tool, 2 hook types, ~600 words)

asi.baseline_assessment: Current doc only covers Claude Code hooks (Stop, PreCompact). Missing: Gemini (BeforeTool, AfterTool), Factory (inherited Claude hooks), and guidance for tools without native hooks (Amp, Codex, OpenCode, Pi, Kilo, CCS)
asi.target_improvement: Expand to cover all 9+ AI tools with hook or polling-based alternatives

description: Expanded docs: cover all 9 AI tools with native hooks (Claude, Gemini, Factory) and polling mode (Amp, Codex, OpenCode, Pi, Kilo, CCS)

asi.hook_types_added: BeforeAgent, AfterAgent, BeforeTool, AfterTool, PreToolUse, PostToolUse
asi.new_sections: Native Hooks, Polling Mode, Tool-Specific Setup, Summary Table
asi.next_steps: Add example hook scripts for Gemini and Factory

description: Add Gemini and Factory hook scripts, complete all AI tool coverage with native hooks + polling modes

asi.confidence: High - no overfitting, comprehensive real coverage
asi.final_state: Complete coverage for all 9 AI tools
asi.patterns_documented: Native hooks (Claude, Gemini, Factory, CCS) + Polling (Amp, Codex, OpenCode, Pi, Kilo)
